ideation: This animation sequence simulates the unveiling of something new, using a combination of both arms to create a sense of reveal.  The movement starts with both arms at the side, then they sweep outward and upward, before settling into a presentation-style pose.  The sequence emphasizes the moment of discovery and excitement associated with something new. Frame 1: Both arms start in a neutral position. Frame 2: Both arms move outward and upward, palms up, suggesting an upward motion. Frame 3: Both arms reach a peak position, palms facing forward, in a gesture similar to a reveal or presentation. Frame 4: The arms settle into a slightly lower position, maintaining the reveal stance but with a more relaxed posture.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready for the reveal
arms sweep outward and upward, palms open to the sky
arms reach their peak, presenting the new discovery
arms settle slightly, holding the new reveal steady
